results.rendered_html:
sāmājika a. (kī f.) [samājaḥ sabhāveśanaṃ prayojanamasya ṭhañ] Belonging to an assembly.
— kaḥ A member of an audience or assembly, a spectator at an assembly or meeting; tena hi tatprayogādevātrabha vataḥ sāmājikānupāsmahe  Māl. 1.
